project_type: Node.js monorepo - distributed task queue engine
build_system: npm workspaces with sequential build (shared -> server -> worker -> dashboard)
test_framework: Vitest with ioredis-mock and mock pg Pool, tests in tests/ directory (phase1-5.test.ts)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build (must succeed with 0 TS errors). 2. Run npm test (all tests must pass including new phase6 tests). 3. Verify all existing 75 tests still pass.
setup_instructions: npm install at root installs all workspaces
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available for testing. No external Redis/Postgres for integration tests - use ioredis-mock and mock pg Pool.
contribution_requirements: ESM modules with 'type': 'module'. NodeNext module resolution. Strict TypeScript. All packages use workspace protocol.
key_patterns: 1. Routes in server/src/routes.ts via Express Router. 2. Config via env vars in src/config.ts. 3. Tests use ioredis-mock + createMockPool pattern (see phase5.test.ts). 4. Tests start real Express servers on port 0 and use fetch. 5. buildRouter accepts RouterDeps interface. 6. Auth should be opt-in - disabled when env vars not set so existing tests pass unchanged. 7. shared/ exports from index.ts barrel file.
directory_structure: shared/ - types, redis keys, pg factories. server/ - Express REST API + Producer SDK + WebSocket event bus. worker/ - BRPOP pull loop, handler registry, scheduler, janitor, rate limiter. dashboard/ - React+Vite+Tailwind UI. tests/ - Vitest integration tests (phase1-5.test.ts). examples/ - smoke.ts. infra/ - postgres SQL migrations.
